head.title: Testimonials
head.description: Testimonials from clients of Artisanal Restoration, highlighting Randall Basti’s quality craftsmanship, clear communication, and meticulous work on historic homes.

description: Here is a selection of testimonials about Artisanal Restoration and owner Randall Basti. You can find more reviews [on HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ArtisanalRestoration.51600239.html).
